title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE LABOR HOSPITAL, A NATIONAL HOSPITAL IN QUEZON CITY, TO QUIRINO MEMORIAL GENERAL HOSPITAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5285 / 60 OG No. 48, 7910 (November 30, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3965, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE LABOR HOSPITAL, A NATIONAL HOSPITAL IN QUEZON CITY, TO QUIRINO MEMORIAL GENERAL HOSPITAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Labor Hospital, a national hospital in Quezon City, shall hereafter be known as Quirino Memorial General Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964,
